creator: m.viey@wanadoo.fr
text:
Hi,

I still have this issue on my side:

```
/usr/ports/graphics/drm-510-kmod/work/drm-kmod-drm_v5.10.163_2/drivers/gpu/drm/i915/gem/i915_gem_shmem.c:687:8: error: implicit declaration of function 'totalram_pages' is invalid in C99 [-Werror,-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
                                          totalram_pages() << PAGE_SHIFT,
                                          ^
1 error generated.
*** [i915_gem_shmem.o] Error code 1

make[2]: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/drm-510-kmod/work/drm-kmod-drm_v5.10.163_2/i915
1 error

make[2]: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/drm-510-kmod/work/drm-kmod-drm_v5.10.163_2/i915

make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/drm-510-kmod/work/drm-kmod-drm_v5.10.163_2
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
the maintainer.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/drm-510-kmod
root@labo:/usr/ports/graphics/drm-510-kmod # 


```

I am trying to build 5.10.163_2, though.

Did I miss something ?
